message:
chore: Add ignore patterns for ephemeral AI tool artifacts

Update .gitignore with patterns for:
- Aider chat history and cache files (.aider.chat.history.md,
  .aider.input.history, .aider.tags.cache.v3/)
- Temporary scratch files (temp_*.rs)

Create .ubsignore for UBS bug scanner with patterns for:
- Build artifacts (target/)
- AI tool artifacts (same as .gitignore)
- Test fixtures (not production code)
- Lock files (auto-generated, not worth scanning)
- Editor/IDE config files
- Environment files

These patterns prevent accidental commits of ephemeral files
and exclude non-production code from static analysis.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,3 +13,11 @@ tests/fixtures/search_demo_data/watch_state.json
 /.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/googleapiclient/discovery_cache/documents
 /.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pygments/lexers
 /.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pygments/lexers/__pycache__
+
+# AI coding tool artifacts
+.aider.chat.history.md
+.aider.input.history
+.aider.tags.cache.v3/
+
+# Temporary scratch files
+temp_*.rs

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# UBS ignore patterns
+# Files and directories that should not be scanned for bugs
+
+# Build artifacts
+target/
+
+# AI coding tool artifacts
+.aider.chat.history.md
+.aider.input.history
+.aider.tags.cache.v3/
+
+# Temporary scratch files
+temp_*.rs
+
+# Test fixtures (not production code)
+tests/fixtures/
+
+# Lock files (auto-generated)
+Cargo.lock
+
+# Editor/IDE
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# Environment
+.env
+.venv/
